Our 5 Delicious Flavors

Crafted with real, recognizable ingredients.

Golden Retriever

Strawberry

Fresh · Fruity · Happy

Made with real strawberries, this classic favorite brings fresh, fruity joy to every lick.

Maltese

Banana

Sweet · Creamy · Comforting

Naturally sweet and irresistibly creamy — a smooth treat your pup will beg for.

Border Collie

Mint

Fresh · Cooling · Soothing

Cool, refreshing, and gentle on sensitive tummies — perfect for warm days.

Dachshund

Peanut Butter

Rich · Nutty · Favorite

Every dog's favorite obsession. Rich, nutty, and packed with natural goodness.

Cavalier King Charles Spaniel

Vanilla

Classic · Smooth · Timeless

Pure, elegant, and universally loved — a timeless classic with natural vanilla.

Which flavor should I choose?

Every dog has a favorite. Here's a simple guide to help families pick their first cup.

🎀

Introducing the Dog Gelato Variety Pack.

10 cups. 2 of each flavor.

The full Dog Gelato experience in one box — shelf-stable and ready for retail, online stores, and distributor programs.

  • 10 cups — 2 of each of the 5 flavors
  • Shelf-stable, ambient temperature
  • No cold chain required
  • Made for retail shelves & online stores
